description:
Parent epic: V3 E3: Context and typed results

Source task 6/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify output validation, repair, bypass, metadata, and guardrail ordering.

Epic closure criteria:
- new users can pass a naked map first and add schema later
- typed results are stable enough for app code
- context/result docs avoid conflating state, memory, and output

comments.text: Verified typed result validation, repair metadata, raw bypass behavior, and result-control ordering. Fixed full-runtime raw mode so it bypasses result controls as well as structured finalization.

title: E3: Verify output validation, repair, bypass, metadata, and guardrail ordering
